input.background: The probability of failure of a medical device when it is tested is equal to 0.05. Assume independence of tests.
input.question: What is the probability that failure occurs in less than 15 tests?

output.answer: The required probability that failure occurs in less than 15 tests is $$\begin{aligned} P(N \leq 14) & =1-(1-p)^{14} \\ & =1-(0.95)^{14} \\ & =0.5123 \end{aligned}$$

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
